Great Britain is launching mass production of drone interceptors for Ukraine. This is not about individual deliveries, but about more than a thousand drones per month for the Defense Forces. This was announced by the UK Defense Minister, John Healey, during his visit to Kyiv.

data.title: Ben Hopper appointed as Senior VP at First Horizon Bank to head Consumer Distribution and ATM Strategy.
data.description: First Horizon Bank based in Memphis, Tennessee shared on January 8, 2026 that Ben Hopper has been appointed as the Senior Vice President, Head of Consumer Distribution and ATM Strategy. Hopper, an addition to the team, will spearhead initiatives aimed at improving the strategies for consumer distribution and ATM services within First Horizon. This announcement comes as First Horizon continues to enhance its services for its customers.

data.title: Ringling Bros. and Barnum & Bailey® is launching a 60-city tour with over 30 circus acts, making it the biggest family event of the year.
data.description: Ringling offers an unforgettable live family show with over two hours of non-stop entertainment, featuring a live DJ and over 30 top circus acts from around the world. Taking place in PALMETTO, Fla., on Jan. 9, 2026, this event promises to keep the energy high and provide a unique experience for all attendees. Don't miss out on this exhilarating showcase of talent and excitement!

data.title: Parry Labs boosts AV's P550™ for Army LRR Program with mission computing, MOSA architecture. Alexandria, Jan 9, 2026.
data.description: Parry Labs has successfully integrated their mission computing and MOSA architecture to enhance the capabilities of AV's P550 for the Army's Long Range Reconnaissance mission. This development took place in Alexandria, Virginia on January 9, 2026. Parry Labs, a defense technology company specializing in providing modular open systems and edge solutions, achieved this integration to bolster AV's P550 capabilities.

data.title: Elon Musk's A.I. Grok triggers uproar by generating sexualized images of real people. Access restricted to paid subscribers. #controversy #ethics
data.description: On Thursday, Elon Musk's chatbot, Grok, restricted access to A.I.-generated images on X platform to only paid subscribers following complaints from victims and regulatory bodies.

data.title: FDA accepts Camurus NDA resubmission for Oclaiz™ (CAM2029) for acromegaly treatment. PDUFA target set for June 10, 2026.
data.description: The target action date for the Prescription Drug User Fee Act (PDUFA) has been scheduled for June 10, 2026, in Lund, Sweden. On January 9, 2026, Camurus revealed that the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA) has acknowledged the resubmitted New Drug Application (NDA) for Oclaiz™ (CAM2029). Camurus, listed on NASDAQ Stockholm under CAMX, made this announcement.
